prestazioni: Engine swap to the Nissan ZD30DDTi (3.0L inline-4 turbo-diesel, code: ZD30DDTi) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel and boost mapping (targeting 350 hp and 550 lb-ft of torque)

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Nismo reinforced clutch kit (part # 30500-4M400), Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the R200 rear axle, and a custom driveshaft by Drive Shaft Shop to handle increased torque

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part # DFV 2240) specifically valved for the Homy's E24 chassis, polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (part # SPF0115K), and custom camber plates by Hardrace for aggressive alignment settings
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny RB-WIDE body kit (E24-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom front bumper lip, and rear diffuser by Varis, all painted in Nissan's original 'Lightning Yellow' (code: BT2)

Custom 18x9.5-inch Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels with a +15 offset, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18), paired with DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors and Endless CC-R6 brake pads for track-ready stopping power

Interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position seats (part # 381) with custom upholstery in Alcantara and yellow stitching, a Nardi Classic steering wheel (380mm), and a full gauge pod by Defi (part # DF13501) for boost, EGT, and oil pressure monitoring
